flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Maine Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Maine Community College rose 47% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 3.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Central Maine Community College are 33% above 6-year earnings ($32.0k → $42.4k).
